name: Holiday Hideaways
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (180°C).
2. Cream the Golden Crisco Shortening, sugar, egg, vanilla, and almond extracts in a large bowl at medium speed of an electric mixer until well blended.
3. Combine flour, baking powder, and salt.
4. Add to creamed mixture, beating at low speed until smooth.
5. Wrap dough around cherries, ensuring they are well covered. Place on an ungreased baking sheet.
6. Bake at 350°F (180°C) for 10 to 12 minutes. Cool.
Coating:
1. Melt chocolate and Golden Crisco Shortening together, stirring until smooth.
2. Dip cooled cookies one at a time in the chocolate, turning to coat completely. Lift the cookie out of the chocolate on a fork and let excess drip off.
3. Place coated cookies on waxed paper-lined baking sheet.
4. Sprinkle chopped pecans over white chocolate-coated cookies and white chocolate shaving over dark chocolate-coated cookies while the chocolate is still wet.
5. Chill to set chocolate.
Hint: These are also nice when rolled in icing sugar instead of being coated with chocolate. Makes: 48 cookies Freezing: Excellent, if uncoated
